name: atmos-monorepo
description: Sovereign P2P compute layer and StratosAgent browser automation framework

comments.overrides: Security: pin patched transitive deps WITHOUT breaking the top-level packages (EFL revenue-path hardening, 2026-06-19). undici→discord.js (high HTTP header-injection/DoS), form-data+qs+tough-cookie→the node-telegram-bot-api request chain (critical form-data boundary CRLF + qs DoS + tough-cookie proto-pollution), uuid→the @solana jayson chain (moderate bounds-check). @solana/web3.js is NOT dropped: it is still imported by packages/atmos-core/src/billing/payment-engine.js + tests, so it is present-and-USED, not present-and-unused — dropping it would break the build. The deprecated `request@2.88.2` chain (request-promise-core, the source of the SSRF + form-data critical) reaches us ONLY via @cypress/request-promise; node-telegram-bot-api itself already uses @cypress/request@3.x (modern form-data). The overrides force the patched transitive versions; verified green against the full hermetic suite + telegram adapter test + a non-prod bridge boot.
